title: Aquaculture Sump Unit
description: Sump entity represents a water treatment and recirculation unit in an aquaculture facility, monitoring water quality parameters such as pH, CO2, redox potential, and gas pressure to ensure optimal conditions for fish containment.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type. It has to be Sump.

co2.description: Property. Model:'http://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mg/L'. Measured dissolved CO2 concentration in the sump water.

pH.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Water pH level measured in the sump unit.

processes.description: Property. List of water treatment processes active in the sump (e.g. ozone injection, UV filtration, oxygen enrichment).

items.description: Property. Name of a water treatment process active in the sump (e.g. ozone injection, UV filtration).

redoxPotential.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mV'. Oxidation-reduction (redox) potential of the water measured in the sump unit.

refFishContainment.description: Relationship. References to the FishContainment entities connected to this sump unit.

anyOf.description: Relationship. Identifier of a FishContainment entity connected to this sump unit.
Relationship. Identifier of a FishContainment entity connected to this sump unit.

totalGasPressure.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'Pa'. Total dissolved gas pressure measured in the sump water.

waterConsumption.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'L'. Volume of water consumed or processed by the sump unit.
